title: Spend Ledger Event
description: One line of {project_root}/.ao/cost/spend.jsonl. Append-only; each billable LLM call emits one event. Keys the event to the run + step that produced it so the cost can be reconciled against the PR-A1 Budget. See docs/COST-MODEL.md §3.

step_id.description: Step within the workflow run. Opaque identifier assigned by the driver; uniqueness within a single run is the driver's responsibility.

vendor_model_id.description: Vendor canonical model identifier for billing/audit reconciliation. Optional for ledger events from adapters that do not surface the vendor ID (self-hosted local models, for instance).

tokens_input.description: Prompt tokens consumed (includes cached tokens — cached_tokens is a subset).

cached_tokens.description: Prompt tokens served from cache (subset of tokens_input). Used by B2 cost runtime to apply cached_input_cost_per_1k rather than input_cost_per_1k to this portion.

cost_usd.description: Total USD cost for this invocation: (tokens_input - cached_tokens) * input_cost_per_1k/1000 + cached_tokens * cached_input_cost_per_1k/1000 + tokens_output * output_cost_per_1k/1000. B2 runtime computes this; operators should not manually author ledger events.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the invocation completed (not when the ledger line was written).
